EA 220Rehab (v6)
Clean The Dish		Lil Uzi Vert & FousheéBrandon Finessin, Breezey Muzik, Bugz Ronin, Don Cannon & qqqu1ncyBenjamin ThomasThe Track was recorded after Uzi's seven month rehab stay. The Track has uncredited background vocals from Fousheé. An alternate version of this Track exists with a completely different chorus and verses. Post-release Trackouts, titled as 'Exercise Files' were made available for purchase from the Mix With The Masters course held by Benjamin Thomas on PureMix. This version of the Track is a post-release mix created a year after the Track's official release for the MWTM course.File Name: LUV-Rehab.Mix.1
